design/hollyshorts-comedy-2025.title: HollyShorts Comedy 2025
design/hollyshorts-comedy-2025.description: Rebrand and Art Direction for HollyShorts Comedy 2025 May 2025 Los Angeles, California www.hollyshortscomedy.com Led the redesign of the Hollywood Comedy Short Film Festival into HollyShorts Comedy, establishing a bold new visual identity aligned with the parent HollyShorts brand. The rebrand included new logo, color palette, and typography, along with a comprehensive design system spanning print, digital, and event assets. Work includes: festival poster, official website website, interactive AR activations, on-screen graphics, award show design, social media assets, festival badges, merchandise, and additional collateral. #block-yui_3_17_2_1_1750120419809_1395 { --tweak-text-block-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; --tweak-text-block-radius: unset; --stroke-style: none;--stroke-thickness: 6px; --tweak-text-block-stroke-color: var(--tweak-text-block-stroke-color);border-width: unset; border-style: unset; border-color: unset; background-color: unset;}#block-yui_3_17_2_1_1750120419809_1395 .sqs-html-content { --tweak-text-block-padding: 6% 6% 6% 6%; padding: unset;}.fe-block-yui_3_17_2_1_1750120419809_1395 { mix-blend-mode: var(--tweak-text-block-blend ); } .fe-block-yui_3_17_2_1_1750120419809_1395 { --tweak-text-block-blend : normal; } .fe-block-yui_3_17_2_1_1750120419809_1395 { --blur-value: blur(15px);}

design/hollyshorts-london.title: HollyShorts London 2025
design/hollyshorts-london.description: Branding and Art Direction for HollyShorts London June 2025 London, United Kingdom www.hollyshorts.com/london Led creative direction and design for the inaugural HollyShorts London, establishing a new visual identity for the festival’s international expansion. Built a city-specific system that stayed grounded in the parent brand while incorporating UK cinematic culture and tone.
